title: Otis Worldwide Corp (OTIS) CEO Judith Marks on Q2 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Otis Worldwide Corp (NYSE:OTIS ) Q2 2022 Earnings Conference Call July 27, 2022 8:30 AM ET Company Participants Michael Rednor - Senior Director, IR Judith Marks - Chair, President & CEO Rahul Ghai - CFO Anurag Maheshwari - Upcoming CFO Conference Call Participants Jeffrey Sprague - Vertical Research Partners Nigel Coe - Wolfe Research Nicholas Housden - RBC Capital Markets Charles Tusa - JPMorgan Chase & Co. John Walsh - Crédit Suisse Miguel Borrega - BNP Paribas Exane Julian Mitchell - Barclays Bank Joel Spungin - Berenberg Operator Good day, and thank you for standing by. Welcome to the Otis Second Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call.

title: Otis Worldwide (OTIS) Beats Q2 Earnings Estimates
text: Otis Worldwide (OTIS) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 10.26% and 1.50%, respectively, for the quarter ended June 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Otis Worldwide (OTIS) to Report Lackluster Earnings in Q2
text: Otis Worldwide's (OTIS) second-quarter revenues and earnings are expected to have been affected by inflation.

title: Earnings Preview: Otis Worldwide (OTIS) Q2 Earnings Expected to Decline
text: Otis Worldwide (OTIS) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.
